name: fk-dev-digest-marketplace
description: SDD engineering workflow, paved-path knowledge skills, architecture review, and research tools extracted from the DevDigest harness.

plugins.name: engineering-paved-path
plugins.description: Canonical knowledge skills for the TypeScript stack: React/Next.js, Fastify, Drizzle, PostgreSQL, Zod, testing, security, Mermaid, onion architecture.

plugins.name: research-tools
plugins.description: Generic read-only researcher agent, doc-writer agent + skill, and a dependency audit skill.

plugins.name: architecture-review
plugins.description: Read-only architecture reviewers that ground every finding in the host repository's own architecture docs.

plugins.name: sdd-engineering
plugins.description: Complete SDD workflow: spec-creator, implementation-planner, implementer, test-writer, plan-verifier agents plus run-plan/implement orchestrators, workflow-retro, and engineering-insights.

plugins.name: agent-ml-interviewer
plugins.description: 21 decision-procedure skills for classical ML, Bayesian inference, forecasting, and LLM/RL parameter choice. Content is in Ukrainian — quarantined from the marketplace's English-only content checks (see validate-marketplace.mjs).

plugins.name: eda-skills
plugins.description: 4 linked skills that turn raw data into a documented, leakage-safe, validated dataset. Content is in Ukrainian — quarantined from the marketplace's English-only content checks (see validate-marketplace.mjs).
